creator: admin@vladiom.com.ua
text:
(In reply to w.schwarzenfeld from comment #5)

No, nothing has changed :(
The problem is still present ...

root@vladiom:~ # pkg version -v | grep webmin
webmin-1.880                       =   up-to-date with index

root@vladiom:~ # uname -srm
FreeBSD 11.1-RELEASE-p6 amd64

Webmin show:
Local disk space 3.67 TB used, 5.27 TB total

Real size:
root@vladiom:~ # zpool list
NAME    SIZE  ALLOC   FREE  EXPANDSZ   FRAG    CAP  DEDUP  HEALTH  ALTROOT
dc     3.62T  2.56T  1.06T         -    33%    70%  1.00x  ONLINE  -
dc2    1.81T  1.11T   715G         -    20%    61%  1.00x  ONLINE  -
zroot  1.80T   459G  1.35T         -    37%    24%  1.00x  ONLINE  -
